invalid_msg.value: Please select a valid combination of attributes.

missing_radio_msg.value: An option must be selected for **%attribute_prompt%**.

missing_text_msg.value: A value must be entered for **%attribute_prompt%**.

error_message.value: There was a problem adding the product to the basket.

description:
## Product Details
A customizable component that allows for flexible design and layout of individual product page templates. Showcase product images, descriptions, pricing, specifications, call-to-action buttons, and more in a way that best suits a particular set of products.
name: Product Details
preview:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="1600" height="837" viewBox="0 0 1600 837">
	<defs>
		<clipPath id="a">
			<rect width="200" height="200" fill="#bbbec3" />
		</clipPath>
	</defs>
	<g id="b">
		<g transform="translate(0 -2895)">
			<g transform="translate(110 -463)">
				<rect width="550" height="549" rx="16" transform="translate(125 3398)"
					fill="#cfd2d6" />
				<g transform="translate(300 3573)">
					<g clip-path="url(#a)">
						<path
							d="M185.24,0H14.507A14.691,14.691,0,0,0,0,14.566V185.457A14.638,14.638,0,0,0,14.52,200l170.921-.051A14.686,14.686,0,0,0,200,185.384V14.544A14.784,14.784,0,0,0,185.24,0M14.545,192.251a6.981,6.981,0,0,1-6.97-6.939V176.1l49.5-49.55,65.673,65.7Zm177.573-6.436a6.977,6.977,0,0,1-6.994,6.411H133.435L83.951,142.674l47.891-47.891,60.292,60.306Zm.047-42.024L134.58,86.506a3.839,3.839,0,0,0-5.4,0l-50.6,50.551L60,118.493a3.792,3.792,0,0,0-5.346,0L7.575,165.334V16.523l-.248-.165.227-2.478A6.9,6.9,0,0,1,14.577,7.6H185.385a6.748,6.748,0,0,1,6.777,6.561l0,.131Z"
							fill="#bbbec3" />
						<path
							d="M66.448,28.164h-.042A28.6,28.6,0,0,0,37.827,56.817l0,1.342A28.64,28.64,0,1,0,66.448,28.164m.563,50.79c-.211.006-.423.008-.634.008A22.607,22.607,0,0,1,43.8,56.932V56.9c-.008-.389-.007-.777,0-1.136a22.619,22.619,0,1,1,23.21,23.184"
							transform="translate(7.282 5.433)" fill="#bbbec3" />
					</g>
				</g>
				<g transform="translate(-41 -69)">
					<text transform="translate(880 3594)" fill="#494a53" font-size="40"
						font-family="Helvetica-Bold, Helvetica" font-weight="700">
						<tspan x="0" y="0">Product Detail</tspan>
					</text>
					<text transform="translate(880 3659)" fill="#494a53" font-size="24"
						font-family="Helvetica">
						<tspan x="0" y="0">$129.99</tspan>
					</text>
					<text transform="translate(991 3659)" fill="#969da8" font-size="24"
						font-family="Helvetica" text-decoration="line-through">
						<tspan x="0" y="0">$199.99</tspan>
					</text>
					<g transform="translate(880 3719)" fill="#fff" stroke="#cfd2d6" stroke-width="2">
						<rect width="414" height="58" rx="4" stroke="none" />
						<rect x="1" y="1" width="412" height="56" rx="3" fill="none" />
					</g>
					<g transform="translate(1260 3751) rotate(-90)">
						<path d="M1.456,0,0,1.44,6.576,8l6.576-6.56L11.7,0,6.576,5.12Z"
							transform="translate(8) rotate(90)" fill="#494a53" />

					<rect width="120" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(880 3533)"
						fill="#969da8" />
					<g transform="translate(0 41)">

						</g>
						<rect width="64" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(926 3881)"
							fill="#fff" />
					</g>
					<g transform="translate(128 41)">
						<g transform="translate(920 3862)">
							<g fill="none" stroke="#494a53" stroke-width="3">
								<rect width="120" height="48" rx="4" stroke="none" />
								<rect x="1.5" y="1.5" width="117" height="45" rx="2.5" fill="none" />
							</g>
						</g>
						<rect width="64" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(948 3881)"
							fill="#494a53" />
					</g>
					<rect width="80" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(880 3697)"
						fill="#969da8" />
					<rect width="140" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(897 3743)"
						fill="#969da8" />
					<rect width="450" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(880 3825)"
						fill="#969da8" />
					<rect width="416" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(880 3847)"
						fill="#969da8" />
					<rect width="240" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(880 3869)"
						fill="#969da8" />
				</g>
				<rect width="670" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(372 4101)" fill="#969da8" />
				<rect width="636" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(389 4123)" fill="#969da8" />
				<rect width="460" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(477 4145)" fill="#969da8" />

						fill="#494a53" />
					<rect width="80" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(699 4053)"

					<rect width="80" height="10" rx="5" transform="translate(799 4053)"
						fill="#969da8" />
				</g>
			</g>
			<rect width="1600" height="837" transform="translate(0 2895)" fill="none" />
		</g>
	</g>
</svg>
